overall.description: Third-person fantasy game footage showing a character approaching an ancient stone temple during a golden sunset. The character walks through a cobblestone courtyard with tall pillars, briefly accompanied by a companion in red, then continues toward an ornate entrance with decorative stairs.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open cobblestone courtyard flanked by massive stone pillars and monuments. A companion in red clothing walks off to the right and exits the scene. The camera tilts upward to reveal the imposing temple facade and roofline silhouetted against the warm sunset sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple entrance pathway with flanking lamp posts leading to stairs

events.description: character begins ascending the decorative stone stairs toward the ornate entrance door

tall ornate metal lamp post with glowing lantern flanking the entrance path
wide stone staircase with carved edges leading up to the temple door

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the temple entrance along a cobblestone path flanked by ornate lamp posts. The massive stone facade and decorated door grow larger as the character nears. The character begins ascending the wide stone stairs toward the intricate metal doorway, leaving the open courtyard behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through an open courtyard that gradually narrows as it approaches the imposing entrance of an ancient temple. It begins with the character walking across a cobblestone plaza flanked by massive stone pillars, while a companion in red clothing peels away to the right. As the camera tilts upward to reveal the temple's silhouette against a warm sunset sky, the perspective shifts back down to follow the character along a path lined with ornate lamp posts. The scene then closes in on the massive stone facade and decorated door, which grow larger and more detailed as the character nears the structure. Finally, the camera follows the ascent up wide stone stairs toward an intricate metal doorway, leaving the open expanse of the courtyard behind.
